results.subject: Social Studies
results.question: What made Manchester symbolic in industrial history?
results.correct_answer: It became a major cotton textile hub linked to global raw material and export networks
incorrect_answers: It led Europe in shipbuilding after 1850
It was a purely agrarian market town
It functioned mainly as a royal military base
